raw.subject: Your Clovis page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed you're really building a fun atmosphere downtown with your Food Truck Friday events and live music. The excitement is palpable, and it's clear you're a big part of what makes Clovis' community come alive.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean you're missing out on bookings and calls from people who want to grab a bite to eat or plan a night out downtown.

I actually sketched out a simple homepage idea based on some of the great photos and posts I've seen on your Facebook page. It includes a menu hero section that showcases your delicious offerings, along with a clear hours block and photo gallery that highlights your food and events.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/rinconcito-mexico-clovis

If you're interested in exploring a simple online presence for your business, I'd love to discuss a straightforward project that gets you up and running with a flat fee for local businesses. Why not reply or give me a quick call to get the conversation started?
